name: GET /api/v1/health/started
statusMessage: 1. Test Case ID: giYR4y  - Undocumented HTTP status code      Received: 400     Documented: 204, 403, 500, 401, 422, 429, 503  [400] Bad Request:  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H '0: ' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/v1/health/started  2. Test Case ID: 2H1V16  - Accepted negative data      Allowed statuses: 400, 401, 403, 404, 422, 5xx  [204] No Content:  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H '0: ' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/v1/health/started  3. Test Case ID: 73s8N3  - Authentication declared but not enforced for this operation      The API returned `204 No Content` for `GET /api/v1/health/started` with invalid auth.  [204] No Content:  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/v1/health/started
